EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The rule with expression "{object.name}" is removed from the allowlist on host {event_src.host}
The allowlist is disabled on host {event_src.host}
The allowlist is enabled on host {event_src.host}
The rule with expression "{object.name}" is added to the allowlist on host {event_src.host}
A rule from the allowlist is changed on host {event_src.host}
